name: Vegetable Soup- Hasa
recipeIngredient: Carrots, peeled and chopped into small pieces (2 medium)
Potatoes, peeled and diced into 1/2-inch cubes (2 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a saucepan.
2. Stir-fry carrots, onion, garlic, and ginger over medium heat for 8 minutes.
3. Add potatoes, tomatoes, and coriander leaves to the pan and stir-fry for another 5 minutes.
4. Add remaining ingredients (water, salt, pepper, cumin) to the pan.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Cover and simmer over medium-low heat for 1 hour or until vegetables are well-done.
